Item.Title: Script Read Through
Item.Description: On 15th July 1977 Graham Chapman, John Cleese, Terry Gilliam, Eric Idle, Terry Jones and Michael Palin went into a studio in London to record a read-through of the draft screenplay for their new film "Monty Python's Life of Brian"
